mapper.sql: SELECT g.*, u.nickname AS seller_nickname, u.credit_score AS seller_credit_score, c.name AS category_name FROM goods g JOIN sys_user u ON g.user_id = u.user_id JOIN goods_category c ON g.category_id = c.category_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods(user_id, category_id, title, description, price, original_price, condition_level, images, trade_location, status) VALUES(#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{conditionLevel}, #{images}, #{tradeLocation}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET status = #{status} WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
UPDATE goods SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goods WHERE status = #{status}
